title: Firestore node fails to save fields correctly
symptom: When attempting to create a document in Firestore, the node merges all fields into one key with null values, resulting in errors like 'columns.split is not a function'.
applies_when: Trying to create a document from a JSON object
not_this_if: Using static key-value pairs in the Columns field
Error occurs in a different node or context
root_cause: The Firestore node's Columns field expects a list of key names, but using expressions that reference values instead leads to null results. This misunderstanding of the expected input format causes the node to fail.
fix_steps: Replace the content of the Columns / Attributes field with the expression '{{ Object.keys($json).join(',') }}'
agent_instruction: Update the Columns / Attributes field in the Firestore node with the correct expression to map keys properly.
